meta.title: Sauke Bidiyo - Sauke Bidiyo na Instagram, YouTube da Facebook
meta.description: Sauke bidiyo daga Instagram, YouTube da Facebook kyauta. Babu app da ake bukata. Da sauri kuma cikin sauƙi.

hero.title: Sauke Bidiyo
hero.subtitle: Sauke bidiyo daga Instagram, YouTube da Facebook nan take. Kyauta, da sauri, kuma babu app.

howto.title: Yadda Ake Sauke Bidiyo
howto.step1_desc: Buɗe Instagram, YouTube ko Facebook kuma kwafi hanyar bidiyo.
howto.step2_desc: Manna hanyar a cikin akwatin da ke sama kuma danna maɓallin Sauke.
howto.step3_desc: Zaɓi ingancin da kake so kuma ajiye bidiyo a na'urarka.

result.title: Bidiyon Ka Ya Shirya!
result.error: Ba a sami bidiyo ba. Duba hanyar kuma sake gwadawa.
result.invalid_url: Da fatan za a shigar da ingantacciyar hanyar Instagram, YouTube ko Facebook.

faq.title: Tambayoyin da Ake Yawan Yi
faq.q1: Shin wannan kayan aiki kyauta ne?
faq.a1: Ee, cikakken kyauta. Babu rajista ko app da ake bukata.
faq.a2: Instagram (Reels, Posts, Stories), YouTube (Bidiyo, Shorts), da Facebook (Bidiyo, Reels).
faq.q3: Shin aminci ne a yi amfani da shi?
faq.a3: Ee. Ba mu adana hanyoyinka ko bidiyo ba. Duk ana yin aiki a lokaci na gaske.
faq.q4: Zan iya sauke bidiyo masu zaman kansu?
faq.a4: A'a. Ana iya sauke bidiyon jama'a kawai.

trending.title: Manyan Bidiyo na Wannan Mako
trending.subtitle: Danna kowane bidiyo don sauke nan take

footer.tagline: Sauke bidiyo da sauri da kyauta daga dandamali da kake so.
footer.disclaimer: Wannan kayan aiki ne don amfanin mutum kawai. Da fatan za a mutunta dokokin haƙƙin mallaka.
